title: A tighter upper bound for the Erdős minimum overlap constant
description: A short computer-assisted note proving mu <= Q < 0.3808669097979875909124431 for the Erdős minimum overlap constant, where Q is an explicit rational number evaluated in exact integer arithmetic. To our knowledge this is the first proven improvement of the minimum-overlap upper bound since Haugland's 2016 record, obtained by evaluating exactly the overlap functional of an explicit step construction together with a short piecewise-linearity lemma; no floating-point quantity enters the certified path. The repository includes the full verification package (scripts and certificates).
